title: scutellaria scordiifolia var. polyphylla
intro: Scutellaria scordiifolia var. polyphylla, also known as a variant of the Asian skullcap plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria scordiifolia var. polyphylla include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support immune system function. Scutellaria scordiifolia var. polyphylla can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
